name: OpenClaw VoxSense
description: Use a multimodal model to understand inbound voice messages in context, then hand the turn back to the main OpenClaw agent.

provider.label: Provider ID
provider.help: Configured model provider id that uses the Google Generative AI API shape, for example haloai-gemini or google.

model.label: Model ID
model.help: Gemini model id used for direct audio handling, for example gemini-3-flash-preview.

channels.label: Channels
channels.help: Message channels where direct audio mode is active. Telegram is implemented today.

historyMessages.label: History Messages
historyMessages.help: How many recent user/assistant messages are forwarded as context before the new audio turn.

maxHistoryChars.label: History Char Budget
maxHistoryChars.help: Maximum total history characters forwarded into the direct audio request.

timeoutMs.label: Request Timeout Ms
timeoutMs.help: Timeout for the direct audio request.

onlyWhenNoText.label: Audio-Only Messages
onlyWhenNoText.help: Only intercept messages whose raw body is an audio placeholder rather than typed text.

mode.label: Mode
mode.help: Use "handoff" to let the audio model understand the voice message and then hand the turn back to the main OpenClaw agent. Use "reply" for the older direct-reply path.

requireStructuredResponse.label: Require Structured Response
requireStructuredResponse.help: Treat non-JSON model output as a failure instead of guessing what the model heard.

suppressDefaultReply.label: Suppress Default Reply
suppressDefaultReply.help: Ask the normal OpenClaw agent run to stay silent while the plugin handles the audio turn.

suppressTranscriptEcho.label: Suppress Transcript Echo
suppressTranscriptEcho.help: Drop chat replies that look like the model merely repeated what it heard.

storeHeardTextInSession.label: Store Heard Text
storeHeardTextInSession.help: Write the hidden heard-text transcript into the session so later turns keep context.

debug.label: Debug Logging
debug.help: Emit richer plugin-side logs for routing, model output previews, and suppression decisions.

systemPrompt.label: System Prompt
systemPrompt.help: Optional extra instruction appended to the direct audio request.

failureNotice.label: Failure Notice
failureNotice.help: Optional text sent back if direct audio handling fails after suppression was armed.
